title: Pakdam Pakdai
desc: There is a constant war between Doggy Don and the three clever mice who live in his house. However, with the help of Doggy Don's brother, an ex-army dog, they fight the mice to win back their house.

title: Zig & Sharko
desc: Zig the hyena lives all alone on a desert island and schemes to eat Marina.

title: Jungle Box
desc: Mysterious boxes and their contents cause chaos for jungle creatures.

title: Pinaki & Happy - The Bhoot Bandhus
desc: Pinaki and his family of ghosts embark on spooky adventures and a series of fun and slapstick comedy as they try to fit in the outside world.

title: Bhoot Bandhus In Super Ghost Carnival
desc: Chaos breaks out when the family of ghosts led by Colonel Suri takes part in the Super Ghost Carnival and meets a veteran's spirit that poses as an enemy.
